mapper.sql: fsqt.id, fsqt.group_id, fsqt.table_name, fsqt.table_description, fsqt.table_abbreviation, fsqt.select_area, fsqt.table_area, fsqt.where_area, fsqt.sort, fsqt.enabled_flag, fsqt.create_time, fsqt.create_by, fsqt.update_time, fsqt.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.table_name as ${tAlias}_table_name, ${tAlias}.table_description as ${tAlias}_table_description, ${tAlias}.table_abbreviation as ${tAlias}_table_abbreviation, ${tAlias}.select_area as ${tAlias}_select_area, ${tAlias}.table_area as ${tAlias}_table_area, ${tAlias}.where_area as ${tAlias}_where_area, ${tAlias}.sort as ${tAlias}_sort, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_super_query_table (group_id, table_name, table_description, table_abbreviation, select_area, table_area, where_area, sort, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tableDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tableAbbreviation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selectArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tableArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{whereArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_super_query_table set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, table_name = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_description = #{tableDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_abbreviation = #{tableAbbreviation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, select_area = #{selectArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_area = #{tableArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_area = #{whereArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
